title: Diospyros buxifolia
taxonomy: Diospyros buxifolia is classified in the family Ebenaceae and belongs to the order Ebenales. It is native to the tropical forests of Asia, and its classification is based on its unique characteristics and morphological features. The genus Diospyros is known for its diverse species, and Diospyros buxifolia is one of the lesser-known but fascinating species within this genus. Diospyros buxifolia is a deciduous tree with a broad, rounded crown and is often found growing in well-drained soils. It is a member of the Ebenaceae family, which is a small family of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions.
